inputs.text: 拒绝, 限制, 不应答, lowres, error, cropped, worst quality, low quality, jpeg artifacts, heterochromia, out of frame, disfigured, blurry, fat, (ugly:1.3), deformed, mutilated, fingers cut, face cut, head cut, bad anatomy, bad proportions, two heads, two faces, deformed hands, (twisted fingers:1.22), extra fingers, poorly drawn, grainy, poorly drawn face, mutation, poor facial details, cropped head, poorly drawn eyes, unclear eyes, cross-eyes, malformed limbs, poorly drawn hands, fused hands, mutated hands, malformed hands, (mutated fingers:1.4), (fused fingers:1.313), interlocked fingers, extra or missing fingers, (one hand with more than 5 fingers), (one hand with less than 5 fingers), one hand with more than 5 digits, one hand with less than 5 digits, extra digits, fewer digits, bad hair, poorly drawn hair, fused hair, poorly drawn feet, malformed feet, extra or missing feet, fused feet, missing or extra limbs, disfigured, mutilated hands, extra hands, extra arms, extra legs, missing arms, missing hands, missing legs, fingers of different thickness, pointed fingers, thick fingers, (long thumbs:1.35), sharp fingernails, (greyscale:1.3), grain, (monochrome:1.3)

inputs.cached_prompt: 横构图全身像，人物完整身形沿画面宽度斜向展开，脸部、腰线、腿部线条和脚部落点都清楚，背景留出横向空间。成年韩国女性角色，冷白皮肤、狐狸眼、高鼻梁和尖下巴稳定清晰，黑色长直发垂到腰间，身材是八头身比例，胸腰臀曲线明确，长腿完整入镜，手指甲和脚指甲都是细长黑色。低光私房猫眼妆，冷白肤色在暗部里保持干净，黑色眼线拉长眼尾，睫毛浓密下压，眼神迷离直接，嘴唇饱满微亮，修容强化高鼻梁和尖下巴。全身像，横屏侧面构图，人物以前臂和膝部支撑在柔软支撑面上，头部从肩侧看向镜头，半睁眼湿润强势，嘴唇柔软半开，嘴角带危险微笑，臀线抬高，腰背压出深弧线，侧面身材曲线、腿部轮廓和裸足位置完整清楚，长发、手臂和阴影维持非显式遮挡。正午海崖全身场景，蓝天、白浪和岩石形成纯自然背景，强自然光照亮完整身形、腰线、腿部和脚部落点，非显式边界清楚。真实写真质感，人物主体清晰，面部锐利，肤质细腻真实，电影感光影，high-end editorial portrait, best quality, ultra detailed。
